name: @log-sparkui/desktop
description: Electron shell for local Spark ZIP reduction + backend LLM analysis
author: SprkLogs Team

scripts.pack:win: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.pack:win:debug: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win --dir -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:win:local: npm run build:backend:win && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
